snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review of PT3 post-effect continuation: Pi may continue model and inspect/search/parse/OCR work after a durable effect, exact effect owners retain incompatible/concurrent mutation rejection, multi-effect aggregation stays AR3, and statuses remain unchanged.

reviewers.independence: Product Planning reviews only contracts and executable governance; Development still owns every implementation deletion, rewrite, security test, package and runtime artifact.

dimensions.summary: The Agent turn remains one Pi-owned run; a durable effect no longer creates a hidden completion mode.
Pi owner, Playbook, Decision Log, acceptance, and no-growth budgets agree on continuation, exact-owner conflicts, and AR3 deferral.
PIGE-PI-001 and E3.08/E3.09 retain their statuses while open work and deletion budgets become exact.
Seven zero-target residue markers and one retained mutation-serialization marker define the next reviewable Development slice.
The Pi owner defines semantics once; Playbook and trace project only delivery and open-work facts within the byte budget.

verification.evidence: Current residue stays within exact source/path budgets; post-combined targets require its removal without status promotion.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: Owner links, PRD/Playbook claims, durable decision structure, and governed byte limits pass.
Requirement/Exit status stays unchanged and semantic claims match the reviewed contract.

coordination.compatibility: Exact effect-owner conflict, CAS, idempotency, and commit validation remain; this contract neither enables nor aggregates multiple durable effects.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning binds the next Development deletion slice; implementation, renderer, executable evidence, and status promotion remain outside this candidate.

nonBlockingRisks: Development must replace the existing no-op test with post-effect continuation and exact-owner conflict acceptance before evidence may be attached.
AR3 must define ordered multi-effect recovery before more than one durable effect is claimed for a turn.
